arguments.command:
SB_URL=$SUPABASE_URL
SB_KEY=$SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY

echo "=== 1. Register CLIENT ==="
CLIENT_REG=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/auth/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"phone":"01011111111","password":"pass123456","role":"CLIENT","address":"شارع الجمهورية، وسط البلد، القاهرة"}')
CLIENT_TOKEN=$(echo $CLIENT_REG | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).token||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
echo "Client token: $([ -n "$CLIENT_TOKEN" ] && echo OK || echo FAIL)"

echo ""
echo "=== 2. Create Order ==="
ORDER_RES=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/orders \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLIENT_TOKEN" \
  -d '{"type":"SHOPPING","shops":[{"shopName":"كارفور المعادي","items":[{"name":"أرز","quantity":2,"price":25},{"name":"زيت","quantity":1,"price":45}]}],"pickupLat":30.0444,"pickupLng":31.2357,"clientAddress":"شارع الجمهورية، وسط البلد"}')
echo "Order: $(echo $ORDER_RES | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success?'OK: '+r.order?.order_number:r.error)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"

echo ""
echo "=== 3. Register COURIER ==="
COURIER_REG=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/auth/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"phone":"01022222222","password":"pass123456","role":"COURIER","name":"محمد المندوب","address":"شارع صلاح سالم، مصر الجديدة"}')
COURIER_TOKEN=$(echo $COURIER_REG | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).token||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
COURIER_ID=$(echo $COURIER_REG | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.user?.id||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
echo "Courier reg: $([ -n "$COURIER_TOKEN" ] && echo OK || echo FAIL)"

echo ""
echo "=== 4. Courier tries to see orders (should be 403 PENDING_REVIEW) ==="
PENDING=$(curl -s http://localhost:8787/api/orders/pending -H "Authorization: Bearer $COURIER_TOKEN")
echo "Pending orders status: $(echo $PENDING | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success===false?'Blocked ('+r.courierStatus+')':'Visible: '+r.orders?.length)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"

echo ""
echo "=== 5. Admin gets couriers list (check PENDING_REVIEW) ==="
# First login as admin
ADMIN_LOGIN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"phone":"01000000001","password":"admin123456"}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
ADMIN_TOKEN=$(echo $ADMIN_LOGIN | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).token||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")

if [ -n "$ADMIN_TOKEN" ]; then
  COURIERS=$(curl -s "http://localhost:8787/api/admin/couriers?status=PENDING_REVIEW" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN")
  echo "Pending couriers: $(echo $COURIERS | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.couriers?.length||0)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"
  
  echo ""
  echo "=== 6. Approve courier ==="
  # Get courier record ID
  COURIER_RECORD=$(curl -s "${SB_URL}/rest/v1/couriers?user_id=eq.${COURIER_ID}&select=id" \
    -H "apikey: $SB_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SB_KEY")
  COURIER_REC_ID=$(echo $COURIER_RECORD | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d)[0]?.id||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
  
  if [ -n "$COURIER_REC_ID" ]; then
    APPROVE=$(curl -s -X PATCH "http://localhost:8787/api/admin/couriers/$COURIER_REC_ID/approve" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" \
      -d '{"status":"APPROVED"}')
    echo "Approve: $(echo $APPROVE | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success?'OK':r.error)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== 7. Approved courier sees pending orders ==="
    PENDING2=$(curl -s http://localhost:8787/api/orders/pending -H "Authorization: Bearer $COURIER_TOKEN")
    echo "Orders visible: $(echo $PENDING2 | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success?r.orders?.length+' orders':'Error: '+r.error)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"
    
    echo ""
    echo "=== 8. Courier accepts order ==="
    ORDER_ID=$(echo $ORDER_RES | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).order?.id||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
    if [ -n "$ORDER_ID" ]; then
      ACCEPT=$(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8787/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/accept" \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer $COURIER_TOKEN")
      echo "Accept: $(echo $ACCEPT | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success?'OK':r.error)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"
      
      echo ""
      echo "=== 9. Courier tries to accept ANOTHER order (should fail) ==="
      # Create second order
      ORDER2=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/orders \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLIENT_TOKEN" \
        -d '{"type":"DELIVERY","pickupAddress":"شارع التحرير 5","pickupPhone":"01011111111","deliveryAddress":"شارع قصر النيل 10","deliveryPhone":"01011111111","pickupLat":30.0444,"pickupLng":31.2357,"deliveryLat":30.0574,"deliveryLng":31.2228}')
      ORDER2_ID=$(echo $ORDER2 | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).order?.id||'')}catch{console.log('')}})")
      
      if [ -n "$ORDER2_ID" ]; then
        ACCEPT2=$(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8787/api/orders/$ORDER2_ID/accept" \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer $COURIER_TOKEN")
        echo "2nd accept (should fail): $(echo $ACCEPT2 | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(r.success===false?'BLOCKED (as expected)':'ALLOWED - bug!'+r.message)}catch{console.log('?')}})")"
      fi
    fi
  fi
else
  echo "No admin found - skipping admin tests"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== DONE ==="
arguments.description: Full end-to-end test of all flows

arguments.command:
